DWH note: in this table, 'Verified' is excluded by the WHERE filter; observed values are empty/NULL, NotVerified, PartiallyVerified. Passthrough from BI_DB_Operations_Onboarding_Flow_UserKPIs.

issues.problem: DDL defines GCID as NOT NULL but the inherited upstream description states 'NULL for older accounts predating GCID introduction'. Writer added DWH notes for NonVerificationReason and EV_MatchStatus but omitted one for this DDL/description contradiction. Should add a DWH note explaining the NOT NULL constraint.
No explicit date range stated. The 3-day rolling window is described conceptually but no concrete date bounds are given (e.g., 'covering the 3-day window ending at last SP execution').

No explicit Phase Gate Checklist section with [x] marks for P2/P3. Footer says 'Phases: 11/14' but doesn't enumerate which phases were completed. Data evidence appears genuine but the audit trail is incomplete.
No Jira or Confluence sources searched due to regen harness mode. Business context validation relies entirely on SP code and upstream wiki.
Gotcha correctly notes the unused @Date parameter but doesn't flag the implication: if an orchestrator passes a date expecting historical replay, the SP silently ignores it and always uses GETDATE().

verdict.regeneration_feedback: No regeneration required (PASS at 9.10). Optional polish: (1) Add DWH note to GCID element about DDL NOT NULL constraint. (2) Add concrete date range note in Section 1. (3) Strengthen @Date parameter gotcha to note silent-ignore risk for orchestrators.
